scripts.api:export: dotnet build backend/Backend.sln && npm run swagger:export --prefix backend
scripts.api:generate: cd frontend && npm run api:generate && npm run format -- --write src/api/generated
scripts.api:sync: npm run api:export && npm run api:generate
scripts.api:check: npm run api:sync && git diff --exit-code frontend/src/api/generated
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:backend:check && npm run format:frontend:check
